product: Databricks-hosted models for Assistant are now GA
tagline: Databricks Assistant with Databricks hosted models is now generally available on all cloud platforms.
what_it_does: Databricks Assistant with Databricks hosted models is now generally available on all cloud platforms. This version of the Assistant is fully powered by models hosted and served directly on Databricks infrastructure — at no additional cost to customers. This page introduces AI assistive features in Databricks that can help you work more efficiently.
why_it_matters: This version of the Assistant is fully powered by models hosted and served directly on Databricks infrastructure — at no additional cost to customers.
plain_summary: Databricks Assistant with Databricks hosted models is now generally available on all cloud platforms. This version of the Assistant is fully powered by models hosted and served directly on Databricks infrastructure — at no additional cost to customers.
key_takeaway: Databricks Assistant with Databricks hosted models is now generally available on all cloud platforms.
